title: Homepage Management
description: Customize your restaurant's homepage to attract and engage customers

tabs.overviewDescription: View the status of all homepage sections
tabs.storyDescription: Share your personal story and passion
tabs.previewDescription: See how your homepage looks to customers

overview.title: Homepage Overview
overview.description: Monitor and manage all sections of your restaurant homepage

heroSection.title: Hero Section
heroSection.description: Main banner with restaurant branding and call-to-action

gallerySection.title: Photo Gallery
gallerySection.description: Showcase your restaurant's atmosphere and dishes

ownerStorySection.title: Owner Story
ownerStorySection.description: Personal story that connects with customers

signatureDishesSection.title: Signature Dishes
signatureDishesSection.description: Highlight your most popular menu items

gallery.title: Gallery Management
gallery.description: Upload and organize photos that showcase your restaurant

upload.title: Upload New Photos
upload.description: Select multiple photos to add to your gallery

empty.title: No Photos Yet
empty.description: Start building your gallery by uploading your first photos

info.heroImage: Choose one image as your hero image - it will be prominently displayed at the top of your homepage

ownerStory.title: Owner Story
ownerStory.description: Share your personal journey and passion for your restaurant

photo.title: Owner Photo
photo.description: Add a personal photo to connect with your customers

story.title: Your Story
story.placeholderEn: Tell your customers about your journey, passion, and what makes your restaurant special...
story.placeholderJa: あなたの歩み、情熱、そしてレストランの特別な魅力についてお客様にお話しください...
story.placeholderVi: Kể cho khách hành về hành trình, đam mê và điều đặc biệt của nhà hàng bạn...

info.personalTouch: A personal story helps customers connect with your restaurant and builds trust

tips.title: Writing Tips
tips.personal: Be authentic and share your personal journey
tips.authentic: Mention what inspired you to open the restaurant
tips.passion: Express your passion for food and hospitality
tips.multilingual: Consider writing in multiple languages for broader appeal

signatureDishes.title: Signature Dishes
signatureDishes.description: Select menu items to feature as your signature dishes

empty.title: No Signature Dishes Selected
empty.description: Choose your best menu items to showcase as signature dishes

selector.title: Select From Menu
selector.description: Browse your menu and select dishes to feature on your homepage

noResults.title: No Items Found
noResults.description: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria

info.recommendation: We recommend selecting 3-6 of your most popular or unique dishes

preview.title: Homepage Preview
preview.description: See how your homepage will look to customers across different devices

viewport.title: Device Preview
viewport.description: Preview your homepage on different devices

status.title: Homepage Status
status.description: Current state of your homepage sections

tips.title: Preview Tips
tips.tip1: Test your homepage on different devices to ensure optimal viewing
tips.tip2: Check that all images load properly and text is readable
tips.tip3: Verify that contact information and hours are up to date
tips.tip4: Make sure the call-to-action buttons work correctly
